title: [VMIC-00] AudioSink abstraction trait + RodioSink + MockAudioSink
scope: AudioSink abstraction seam for current speaker playback and future virtual microphone sinks

commands.name: issue-test-cases
commands.command: cargo +stable-x86_64-pc-windows-gnu test --bin tui-translator -- mock_sink_records_play_calls playback_service_routes_to_mock_sink disabled_playback_service_drops_audio set_enabled_gates_subsequent_play

review.initial_result: found interruptibility regression in Rodio playback loop
review.final_result: CLEAN after restoring shutdown and disable interruption during current clip playback

notes: RodioSink is intentionally constructed inside the playback thread because rodio OutputStream is thread-bound.
Injected sinks use Box<dyn AudioSink> for deterministic tests and future virtual microphone output sinks.
The enable gate uses SeqCst atomics so a just-disabled service cannot route subsequent queued audio.
